summary: Multimedia content app 'Dard-e-munasif' with categorized content (Dua, Poetry, Songs, Mix). Features PIN-protected admin panel (PIN: 09186114), auto-generated like counts, download buttons for Poetry/Dua, protected audio streaming for Songs, and clean aesthetic design. Custom logo (black & white circular image with blindfolded figure) applied across navbar, header, and favicon. New features: full-screen modal for Poetry/Dua posts, hybrid Music Player (inline preview + full-screen Now Playing UI), Web Audio API filters (Standard/Clean Sound/Ultra Clean Sound), IndexedDB-based History and Downloads, hamburger menu (top right) with History/Downloads/Volume Manager, external redirects for 'Be a Writer' (WhatsApp) and 'Contact' (Gmail).
architectural_notes: Content categorization system: Dua, Poetry, Songs, Mix
Audio streaming without download capability for Songs
File upload system for images and audio files
Auto-generation of like counts (1,000-2,000 range) for social proof
Backend data persistence for all content types
Backend upload functions had redundant admin authorization check separate from PIN auth - fix: remove backend admin check and rely on PIN-protected frontend guard
IndexedDB used for History (metadata) and Downloads (audio Blobs) for offline access
Web Audio API pipeline for audio filters: Standard (raw), Clean Sound (High-Pass + 3kHz gain), Ultra Clean Sound (Band-Pass + Compressor)
known_issues: Poetry section fails to load with 'failed to load poetry try again later' error - backend query issue

All content sections (Poetry, Dua, Songs) showing 'Failed to load content, please try again later' - fetch hooks (useGetAllPoetry, useGetAllDua, useGetAllSongs) failing due to likely mismatched function signatures or data shape issues

existing_features.title: Create main navigation with four categories: Dua (spiritual prayers), Poetry (poetic text/images), Songs (relaxing music/sounds), and Mix (combined feed showing trending content from all three categories). Homepage must display Mix section by default.
Implement Poetry posts with text/image content display, Download button, Like button, and auto-generated random like counts between 1,000-2,000 for social proof. Display category tag on each post.
Implement Dua posts with text/audio content display, Download button, Like button, and auto-generated random like counts between 1,000-2,000 for social proof. Display category tag on each post.
Implement Song posts with Play/Pause audio player controls only. Completely disable and hide download option for all song/audio posts. Display category tag on each post.
Create a secured /admin route hidden from normal navigation. Implement PIN authentication that ONLY accepts the exact PIN '09186114'. Do not allow any access to admin panel without correct PIN entry.
Implement admin panel functionality to upload new Poetry content with text/image, title, and content fields. Assign Poetry category automatically.
Implement admin panel functionality to upload new Dua content with text/audio, title, and content fields. Assign Dua category automatically.
Implement admin panel functionality to upload new Songs with audio files, title, and artist fields. Assign Songs category automatically.
Implement admin panel content management interface to view all posts and delete or manage existing content across all categories.

Design frontend with relaxing aesthetic using minimalist pastel colors or elegant dark mode option, modern calming typography, smooth animations and transitions, and responsive design for mobile and desktop.
Implement audio playback functionality for Dua and Song posts with proper streaming and play/pause controls.
Support display of Urdu and Hindi content in all text fields (titles, content, artist names) with proper Unicode rendering.

Investigate and fix the /admin route so it displays correctly. Verify that the route is properly registered in the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx and that the AdminPage component is being rendered without errors.
Ensure the PINAuthGuard component in AdminPage.tsx is functioning correctly and properly validates the PIN '09186114' before showing the admin panel content.
Verify that all admin panel components (ContentManagement, PoetryUploadForm, DuaUploadForm, SongUploadForm) are properly imported and rendered without breaking the page.
Check for any routing conflicts, missing imports, or JavaScript errors that might prevent the admin panel from rendering. Review browser console logs and network requests for any failures.
Ensure all admin panel components (PINAuthGuard, ContentManagement, PoetryUploadForm, DuaUploadForm, SongUploadForm) are correctly imported and render without breaking the page
Verify that the /admin route is properly registered in the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx with correct path and component mappings to ensure AdminPage renders without errors
Ensure the PINAuthGuard component in AdminPage.tsx correctly validates the hardcoded PIN '09186114' and properly manages authentication state in sessionStorage before rendering admin panel content

Verify that all admin panel components (ContentManagement, PoetryUploadForm, DuaUploadForm, SongUploadForm) are correctly imported in AdminPage.tsx with proper import paths and render without breaking the page

Investigate and resolve any routing conflicts, missing imports, or JavaScript runtime errors that prevent the admin panel from rendering by checking browser console logs, network requests, and component lifecycle errors
Ensure the admin panel page at /admin is accessible by direct URL navigation and displays the full admin interface including PIN authentication, content upload forms, and content management sections

Update the frontend upload mutation hooks (useCreatePoetry, useCreateDua, useCreateSong in useQueries.ts) and their corresponding form components (PoetryUploadForm, DuaUploadForm, SongUploadForm) to ensure they do not pass any admin token or special authorization header that could be mismatched or missing, relying solely on the anonymous actor call after PIN authentication passes.

Update the app name from 'Spiritual Hub' to 'Dard-e-munasif' everywhere it appears in the frontend — including the navbar/header title text, browser tab title (index.html <title>), and any other visible branding locations.

Replace the current logo/icon in the navbar, header, and favicon with the uploaded circular black & white logo image (dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png) saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/. Display it as a circular image next to the app name in the header and set it as the browser favicon.

Fix the useGetAllPoetry React Query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to correctly call the backend actor's poetry fetch method, handle errors gracefully, and ensure the query key, actor call, and data transformation are all correct so the Poetry page renders content instead of the error state.

Verify and fix the PoetryPage component (frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx) to ensure the error boundary and loading skeleton states work correctly, and that the error alert is not triggered due to incorrect data shape mapping (e.g., mismatched field names between backend response and frontend type expectations).

When a user clicks on any post card in the Poetry or Dua category pages (or in the Mix feed), open a full-screen overlay modal displaying the full post content (title, image/audio, content text). Place a prominent ❌ close button at the top-right corner. Clicking ❌ dismisses the modal and returns the user to the feed without any page navigation.

Implement a hybrid Music Player for the Songs category. In the feed (SongsPage and MixPage), keep the existing small inline Play/Pause button on each song card for quick preview. When a user clicks anywhere on the song card except the inline Play/Pause button, open a full-screen 'Now Playing' UI featuring: album art placeholder, song title and artist name, a progress seeker bar (scrubable), Play/Pause button, elapsed/total time display, and a 'Now Playing' aesthetic. The full-screen player must be dismissible with a ❌ or down-arrow button.

Implement Web Audio API-based audio processing filters integrated into the Volume Manager. Three modes must produce real audio effects: (1) Standard — no filter, raw audio passthrough; (2) Clean Sound — apply a BiquadFilterNode High-Pass filter (cutoff ~200Hz) plus a BiquadFilterNode Peaking EQ at 3kHz with a positive gain boost (~4dB) to enhance voice/lyric clarity; (3) Ultra Clean Sound — apply a BiquadFilterNode Band-Pass filter plus a DynamicsCompressorNode to normalize volume and produce crisp, compressed output. The selected filter must apply to all audio playback across Song and Dua audio players.

Add a persistent Hamburger Menu (3-line icon) in the upper-right corner of the app header/navbar that is visible on all pages. The menu must contain three sections: (1) History — displays recently opened posts and songs (title, category, timestamp), stored as metadata in IndexedDB; (2) Downloads — lists audio files the user has downloaded, stored as Blobs in IndexedDB, with Play and Delete options for offline playback; (3) Volume Manager — contains a master volume slider (0–100%) and three mutually-exclusive filter toggle buttons: Standard, Clean Sound, Ultra Clean Sound. The hamburger menu must persist its open/close state appropriately across page navigation without full re-mount.

Implement IndexedDB storage utilities for History and Downloads. For History: on every post/song open event (modal open or full-screen player open), save metadata {id, title, category, timestamp} to an IndexedDB object store named 'history'. Display the 50 most recent entries in the History section. For Downloads: when a user downloads audio from a Dua post, save the audio Blob plus metadata {id, title, category} to an IndexedDB object store named 'downloads'. Allow offline playback of downloaded audio directly from IndexedDB Blob URLs. Provide a delete function to remove individual downloaded items.

Add a 'Be a Writer' button and a 'Contact' button in the hamburger menu (or as accessible footer/menu items visible on all pages). 'Be a Writer' must open the URL https://wa.me/919541525891?text=Join%20%E2%80%A2%7C-%C2%B0-%7C%E2%80%A2Program.Writter in a new tab. 'Contact' must open mailto:dariqlas744@gmail.com in the default mail client (or compose link). Both buttons must be clearly labeled.

Fix the useGetAllPoetry, useGetAllDua, and useGetAllSongs React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts. Ensure each hook calls the correct backend actor method name exactly as defined in the Motoko actor, uses a stable query key, and correctly transforms the backend response (mapping Motoko record field names to frontend TypeScript type field names). Add graceful error handling so a failed fetch shows a user-friendly error state rather than crashing the UI.

Verify and fix the PoetryPage, DuaPage, and SongsPage components to ensure their loading skeleton states, error states, and empty states are triggered correctly based on the actual data shapes returned by the fixed hooks. Remove any code that incorrectly maps field names or makes incorrect type assumptions that could cause a valid response to be treated as an error.

Fix the useGetAllPoetry, useGetAllDua, and useGetAllSongs React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts. Ensure each hook calls the exact backend actor method name as defined in the Motoko actor, uses a stable query key, and correctly transforms the backend Candid response by mapping Motoko record field names to the matching TypeScript type field names. Add try/catch error handling so a failed fetch returns a user-friendly error state instead of crashing the UI.

Verify and fix PoetryPage, DuaPage, and SongsPage components so their loading, error, and empty states are triggered correctly based on the actual data shapes returned by the fixed hooks. Remove any field-name mismatches or incorrect type assumptions that cause a valid response to be rendered as an error state. Ensure content renders when the backend returns valid data.

Fix the MixPage component to correctly aggregate data from the useGetAllPoetry, useGetAllDua, and useGetAllSongs hooks after the hook fixes in REQ-42. Ensure the combined trending feed renders content from all three categories when any category has available posts, and shows appropriate loading/error states.

new_feature_requests.summary: Main navigation with four categories: Dua, Poetry, Songs, and Mix (default homepage showing trending content from all categories)
Poetry & Dua posts with Download button, Like button, and auto-generated like counts (1,000-2,000)
Song posts with Play/Pause audio player only (download completely disabled and hidden)
Secured /admin route with PIN authentication (PIN: 09186114) - no access without correct PIN
Admin panel features: upload Poetry (text/image), Dua (text/audio), Songs (audio), assign categories, delete/manage content, view all posts
Relaxing aesthetic UI with minimalist pastel colors or elegant dark mode, modern typography, smooth animations, responsive design
Backend with data persistence, file uploads (images/audio), audio playback, secure PIN validation, Urdu/Hindi content support

Implement backend data models and persistence for storing Poetry (text, image, title, content, category, like count), Dua (text, audio, title, content, category, like count), and Songs (audio, title, artist, category) with proper file upload handling for images and audio files.

Remove or bypass the backend admin authorization check in the Motoko main actor for the createPoetry, createDua, and createSong functions so that any caller can successfully upload content. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the only authentication gate required — the backend should not reject upload calls with 'Unauthorized: Only admins can create poetry' (or equivalent messages for Dua/Song). All three upload functions must accept requests without requiring a separate admin identity or token.
Rename app from 'Spiritual Hub' to 'Dard-e-munasif' and replace branding with the uploaded black & white circular logo (blindfolded figure) across navbar, header, and favicon.

Investigate and fix the backend Motoko actor's getAllPoetry (or equivalent) query function to ensure it returns poetry entries correctly without errors or traps. Verify the function signature, return type, and that stored data is accessible without causing a rejection.
Full-screen modal for Poetry & Dua posts with ❌ close button to return to feed
Hybrid Music Player: inline Play/Pause on song cards in feed, full-screen Now Playing UI (album art, seeker bar, Play/Pause) when card is tapped
Web Audio API filters in Volume Manager: Standard (no filter), Clean Sound (High-Pass + 3kHz boost), Ultra Clean Sound (Band-Pass + Dynamics Compressor)
Hamburger menu (top right, persists across pages) with History (IndexedDB metadata), Downloads (IndexedDB audio Blobs for offline), and Volume Manager (master slider + filter toggles)
External redirects: 'Be a Writer' button → WhatsApp (https://wa.me/919541525891?text=Join%20•|-°-|•Program.Writter), 'Contact' → Gmail compose to dariqlas744@gmail.com

Audit the backend Motoko actor in backend/main.mo and verify that getAllPoetry, getAllDua, and getAllSongs (or their equivalent query functions) have correct function signatures, return types, and can be called without trapping or rejecting. Ensure each function returns an array of the correct record type with all expected fields (id, title, content, category, likeCount, and any media blob fields).

Audit the backend Motoko actor in backend/main.mo and verify that getAllPoetry, getAllDua, and getAllSongs query functions have correct function signatures, return types, and stable variable access. Ensure each function returns an Array of the correct record type with all expected fields (id, title, content, category, likeCount, and any media blob fields) without trapping or rejecting. Fix any issues found so all three query functions execute successfully.
